group.value: Group F — opponents Japan, Sweden, Tunisia

qualification.value: Qualified as a UEFA group winner (direct) in 2025 European Qualifiers

recent_form.value: Euro 2024 semi-finalists. Top-8 ranked entering 2026 under Koeman.

wc_role.value: Contender — top-8 ranked, talented but with significant injury losses pre-tournament

key_players.value: Virgil van Dijk (captain), Memphis Depay (all-time Oranje top scorer), Cody Gakpo, Frenkie de Jong, Tijjani Reijnders

squad_news.value: Significant injury losses: Jurrien Timber ruled out (persistent groin injury), with Lutsharel Geertruida called up as replacement; Xavi Simons out after rupturing his ACL ~47 days before the tournament.

wc2026_match1_result.value: Netherlands 2-2 Japan (Group F opener, 14 June 2026, Dallas). Oranje led TWICE — Van Dijk 51' header, Summerville 64' — but were pegged back both times (Nakamura 57', Kamada 88'). Dominated possession (60%) and xG but dropped two points; per commentary the Netherlands had 'never failed to win a World Cup game having taken the lead twice'.

image.attribution: Zscout370 / Public domain via Wikimedia Commons
